name: RPlog_Simon_s_Fate
title: Simon's Fate
summary: On the Gold Beaches of Coronet City, the Telgossian Simon Sezirok at last agrees to attempt the forbidden soul-meld with the Jedi Jessalyn Valios, the intimacy he had long feared. As they share their souls, Simon -- too eager and thirsting for what she withholds -- forces past her shields and uncovers her love for Luke Skywalker, who looks on from a distance with Han Solo. Convinced he has been used and corrupted into a Jedi, the betrayed Simon falls fully to the Dark Side, his face splitting into monstrous horns, and attacks. He fells Han with a Force blow and duels Luke and the fledgling Orson Tighe, until Jessalyn, foreseeing Luke's death, severs Simon's hand at the wrist. Simon impales Luke's leg with a clawed stump of bone and flees, leaving his rose-carved staff behind, while a heartbroken Jessalyn tends the wounded, unconscious Luke and calls for medics.
